name: large
description: A dense prompt with a long description and 12 metadata rows.

input.title: Approve the 2026-Q2 contract renewal for ACME Corp?
input.description: ACME Corp's 2026-Q2 renewal moves them from the Pro tier to Enterprise. New seat count is 248 (was 120). Net ARR uplift is $186,400. Term is 24 months, with a 12-month opt-out at month 13. Custom MSA accepted with two amendments: (a) AWS data residency in eu-central-1 only; (b) SOC 2 Type II audit report supplied annually. Procurement signed the amendments on 2026-05-21. Legal review complete. Finance approval pending — your sign-off triggers the contract send via DocuSign.
